title: "Can't get full HD res. on both my screens. Help?"
date: 2013-05-31
forum: General Help

### Post by larsson152 on 2013-05-31
Hi!

I have had a problem with my screen setup on linux since i bought this computer. After installing nvidia propietary driver and running "nvidia-xconfig" i get this output from xorg.conf:
```
# nvidia-xconfig: X configuration file generated by nvidia-xconfig
# nvidia-xconfig:  version 310.44  (buildmeister@swio-display-x86-rhel47-07)  Wed Mar 27 15:56:20 PDT 2013

Section "ServerLayout"
    Identifier     "Layout0"
    Screen      0  "Screen0"
    InputDevice    "Keyboard0" "CoreKeyboard"
    InputDevice    "Mouse0" "CorePointer"
EndSection

Section "Files"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
    # generated from default
    Identifier     "Mouse0"
    Driver         "mouse"
    Option         "Protocol" "auto"
    Option         "Device" "/dev/psaux"
    Option         "Emulate3Buttons" "no"
    Option         "ZAxisMapping" "4 5"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
    # generated from default
    Identifier     "Keyboard0"
    Driver         "kbd"
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
    Identifier     "Monitor0"
    VendorName     "Unknown"
    ModelName      "Unknown"
    HorizSync       28.0 - 33.0
    VertRefresh     43.0 - 72.0
    Option         "DPMS"
EndSection

Section "Device"
    Identifier     "Device0"
    Driver         "nvidia"
    VendorName     "NVIDIA Corporation"
EndSection

Section "Screen"
    Identifier     "Screen0"
    Device         "Device0"
    Monitor        "Monitor0"
    DefaultDepth    24
    SubSection     "Display"
        Depth       24
    EndSubSection
EndSection


```

but this only gives me 1080p on my secondary screen(samsung TV) and maximum 640x480 on my primary screen(samsung monitor). However, I can get 1080p on my primary screen using another xorg.conf but that disables my secondary screen and that conf-files looks like this:
```

[COLOR=#660066]Section[/COLOR] [COLOR=#008800]"Monitor"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Identifier[/COLOR]     [COLOR=#008800]"Generic Monitor"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]HorizSync[/COLOR]       [COLOR=#006666]66.6[/COLOR] [COLOR=#666600]-[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]66.6[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]VertRefresh[/COLOR]     [COLOR=#006666]59.9[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Modeline[/COLOR] [COLOR=#008800]"1920x1080"[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]138.500[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]1920[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]1968[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]2000[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]2080[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]1080[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]1083[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]1088[/COLOR] [COLOR=#006666]1111[/COLOR] [COLOR=#666600]+[/COLOR]hsync [COLOR=#666600]-[/COLOR]vsync
[COLOR=#660066]EndSection[/COLOR]

[COLOR=#660066]Section[/COLOR] [COLOR=#008800]"Device"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Identifier[/COLOR]     [COLOR=#008800]"Generic Video Card"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Driver[/COLOR]         [COLOR=#008800]"nvidia"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Option[/COLOR]         [COLOR=#008800]"ConnectedMonitor"[/COLOR] [COLOR=#008800]"DFP-1"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Option[/COLOR]         [COLOR=#008800]"UseEDID"[/COLOR] [COLOR=#008800]"false"[/COLOR]

[COLOR=#660066]EndSection[/COLOR]

[COLOR=#660066]Section[/COLOR] [COLOR=#008800]"Screen"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Identifier[/COLOR]     [COLOR=#008800]"Default Screen"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Device[/COLOR]         [COLOR=#008800]"Generic Video Card"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Monitor[/COLOR]        [COLOR=#008800]"Generic Monitor"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Option[/COLOR]         [COLOR=#008800]"ExactModeTimingsDVI"[/COLOR] [COLOR=#008800]"TRUE"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]Option[/COLOR]         [COLOR=#008800]"ModeValidation"[/COLOR] [COLOR=#008800]"DFP-1: AllowNon60HzDFPModes, NoEdidModes, NoVesaModes, NoXServerModes"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]DefaultDepth[/COLOR]    [COLOR=#006666]24[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]SubSection[/COLOR]     [COLOR=#008800]"Display"[/COLOR]
        [COLOR=#660066]Depth[/COLOR]       [COLOR=#006666]24[/COLOR]
        [COLOR=#660066]Modes[/COLOR]      [COLOR=#008800]"1920x1080"[/COLOR]
    [COLOR=#660066]EndSubSection[/COLOR]
[COLOR=#660066]EndSection[/COLOR]
```

I think the solution is to combine these two xorg.conf but I don't know how?
I have tried alot of options using xorg man pages but with no success.
Anyone here want to help me with this problem?
Im running on an nvidia GTX275 (GT200b)

/Patrik
